title: DIMCP EP_21 NO7582 here
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_21 NO7582 here.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Plug it back to the Shada Dog as my co-pilot.
[00:00:02.00] Uh...
[00:00:03.70] We're trying to get this sub sandwich to Chad.
[00:00:06.40] Uh, my delivery dog here just has to give Chad a phone call.
[00:00:11.50] Uh...
[00:00:13.20] Cause I don't see 7582.
[00:00:16.70] We saw it 75817582.
[00:00:19.20] I must be blind cause I don't see 7582 out here.
[00:00:24.00] Chad?
[00:00:27.20] I see 7583...
[00:00:29.70] 7581...
[00:00:33.70] I just don't see 7582 right now Chad.
[00:00:36.80] Drown me in the loony bin. I must call me crazy.
[00:00:40.50] I'm gonna have to throw you in the loony bin bro.
[00:00:42.30] Can't see shit.
[00:00:46.30] What's up Chad?
[00:00:47.20] I must need some new prescription cause I must be blind.
[00:00:50.90] I don't see shit.
[00:00:52.10] 7582 right now.
[00:00:55.90] And I'm getting drunk here on the show.
